news.title: WFW advises lenders on Mirova Swedish wind portfolio financing
news.summary: Watson Farley & Williams has advised Danske Bank and La Banque Postale, acting as lenders on a secured senior financing granted to Mirova for its recent acquisition of an operational onshore wind portfolio in Sweden from Eolus.
